productName: SPR - 1g Infused Blunt - Charmz x Moon Pie
description: A hybrid blunt of Charmz x Moon Pie taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of diesel, berry, and sweet, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
